```python
def main():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    if not S:
        print("")
        return
    
    reversed_S = S[::-1]
    modified_str = S + '#' + reversed_S
    lps = [0] * len(modified_str)
    
    for i in range(1, len(modified_str)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and modified_str[i] != modified_str[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if modified_str[i] == modified_str[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    longest_prefix_suffix = lps[-1]
    shortest_palindrome = S + reversed_S[:len(S) - longest_prefix_suffix]
    print(shortest_palindrome)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
